title: olearia durifolia
intro: Olearia durifolia, also known as the New Zealand tree daisy, is a flowering shrub native to New Zealand and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Olearia durifolia include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as its potential to treat gastrointestinal issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Olearia durifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
